creator: kapilajm@gmail.com
text:
parallels-tools fails to build with the following error

===>  parallels-tools-0.1.2_1 is only for amd64 i386, while you are running
aarch64.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/emulators/parallels-tools

Parallels Desktop 18 Version 18.0.1 (53056)
13.1-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC arm64
